name: Barranca Mesa Tennis Courts
description: Barranca Mesa Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Los Alamos, NM. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: First Baptist Church Los Alamos
description: The First Baptist Church does not sponsor this event. They have allowed the Pajarito Pickleball Club use of the gym during the winter months and in the event of inclement weather.
open_play_schedule: Events will be posted on TeamReach. Use code - 87544.

name: Myrtle Street Pickleball Courts
description: Myrtle Street Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Los Alamos, NM. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include trainers or lessons.

name: North Mesa Tennis Courts
description: There are few people who play at North Mesa. One court is not playable. Another court is not safe. The playing surface is crumbling. These courts are scheduled to be demolished and rebuilt this year, 2024, with 4 dedicated pickleball courts and one tennis court.

name: Pinon Park
description: Pinon Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in White Rock, NM. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Event schedule is on the TeamReach app. The code is “WhiteRock.”

name: Rover Park
description: Rover Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in White Rock, NM. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: The Family YMCA
description: The Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Los Alamos, NM. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the court. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
